canonical_question: When to use patent vs trade secret vs trademark vs copyright — applicability, cost benchmarks, timelines?
aliases: Which type of IP protection do I need for my startup?
Patent vs trade secret decision tree for startups
How much does IP protection cost and how long does it take?

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: USPTO fee schedule revised effective January 19, 2025; trademark fee restructuring effective January 18, 2025

constraints: USPTO fees change annually — verify current fee schedule at uspto.gov before filing
Patent applications require full public disclosure of the invention — this is irreversible once published
Trade secret protection is lost permanently if the secret becomes public through any means
Trademark must be used in commerce to maintain registration
Copyright registration is required before filing infringement suit in US federal court
US jurisdiction primarily — international filing adds significant cost and complexity

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User already knows which IP type they need and wants filing instructions only
User needs international IP strategy across multiple jurisdictions
User needs to evaluate IP portfolio for fundraising or M&A

inputs_needed.question: What type of innovation needs protection?
Can competitors discover the innovation by examining the product?
What is the IP protection budget?

related_to.label: NDAs required for trade secret protection
